newspaper: Unknown (context suggests it could be from Rio de Janeiro, given the mention of the Cattete Palace)
original_snippet_context: A news brief about a meeting between a congressman and the President.
relevant_quote: Esteve hoje no palácio do Cattete o deputado federal por S. Paulo sr. dr. Costa Junior, que alli conferenciou longamente com o sr. presidente da Republica, communicando a s. exa. os motivos que levaram o sr. dr. Campos Salles a não acceitar a presidencia da Caixa de Conversão
justification: This snippet reports a meeting and the discussion of Campos Salles' refusal of the Caixa presidency. It doesn't express any opinion about the Caixa itself or its proposed conversion rates.
